reviews.author: Amanda L.
reviews.text: Love the small bowl concept! We ordered 5 different dishes between 2 people and got to try so much. The somtum was fiery and the larb was perfectly balanced.

reviews.author: Jason T.
reviews.text: Finally, authentic Isan flavors in Wangsa Maju. The gai yang tastes like it came straight off a charcoal grill in Buriram. Will be back.

reviews.author: Mei F.
reviews.text: Cozy spot with really thoughtful portions. Perfect for when you want variety without waste. The Thai milk tea is the real deal too.
